meta.title: Kök Kalkan — Modern Turkish Cuisine & Tasting Menu in Kalkan
meta.description: Chef-driven fine dining in Kalkan. Chef Ozan Orakcı reinterprets Turkish flavours with Western technique on a rooftop terrace above the sea. Tasting menu, à la carte, online reservations.
meta.ogAlt: Kök Kalkan rooftop terrace at sunset in Kalkan, Antalya

hero.title: A table where roots become memory.
hero.subtitle: Chef-driven dining on a rooftop terrace above the Kalkan sea — local markets, Western technique, and the slow craft of creating a memory.

philosophy.title: We don't just serve a meal. We try to create a memory.
body: Every morning begins at the local markets — whatever is ripest, freshest and closest to its roots decides the day. We cook with the season, waste as close to nothing as we can, and treat sustainability as a discipline rather than a slogan.

Our cooking takes the Turkish flavours we grew up with and reinterprets them through Western technique — familiar memories, told in a new language. The aim is to slow you down: to share, to linger, and to leave with something more than a full plate.

highlights.label: Roots
highlights.text: Local markets, the season, ingredients close to the soil.

highlights.label: Memory
highlights.text: Familiar Turkish flavours, reinterpreted to be shared and remembered.

highlights.label: Modern
highlights.text: Western technique, near-zero waste, quiet sustainability.

chef.name: Ozan Orakcı
chef.quote: I want every guest to leave with a memory, not just a meal.
chef.bio: Kök Kalkan is the work of chef Ozan Orakcı, who built the restaurant around a single idea: that the deepest flavours are the ones closest to their roots. He leads the kitchen with a chef-driven menu that changes with the markets and the season.
chef.bioNote: Placeholder bio — to be replaced with Ozan's approved text.

tasting.title: The Chef's Journey to the Roots
tasting.intro: A single journey, course by course, served to the whole table — from a month-aged lavender olive oil to a final Turkish coffee.
tasting.askPrice: Please ask for the current price

alacarte.title: Dishes with a name and a memory
alacarte.intro: A handful of signature plates, each a small story. Dietary markers are shown beside each dish.

space.title: A whitewashed rooftop, open to the sea
space.body: A terrace of natural light by day and warm candlelight by night — sea on one side, mountains on the other, and the slow Mediterranean evening in between.

reservation.title: Reserve your table
reservation.intro: Tell us when you'd like to join us and we'll confirm directly. The tasting menu is served to the whole table, so please share any allergies in advance.
